stemHtml:
Given the following information, what is the Underload/Overload?

Maximum Structural Take-Off Mass: 6400 kg
Performance Limited Take-Off Mass: 6400 kg
Performance Limited Landing Mass: 5430 kg
Operating Mass: 4480 kg
Take-Off Fuel: 1440 kg
Trip Fuel: 1090 kg
Mass of the crew and their baggage: 235 kg
Traffic Load: 1870 kg
